name: Rainbow Kids' Tapestry - Pillowfort™: Multicolored Cotton Wall Art, Vertical Spring Sky Decor, 14"x13"
description: Liven up your kiddo's indoor space with this Rainbow Tapestry from Pillowfort™. The vertical wall decor features a rainbow tapestry on the front for magical style, along with tassel detailing at the bottom for charming texture and flair. Plus, it has a dowel rod and corded string at the top for easy hanging on any wall or door.
